title: Quick Garlic Broccoli Pasta
summary: A fast vegan pasta with broccoli, garlic, olive oil, and lemon. It is light, practical, and ideal for a quick dinner.
characteristicPhrase: Quick Garlic Broccoli Pasta is a fast plant-based dinner ready in about 20 minutes, with fresh broccoli, garlic, and lemon.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta.
Add the broccoli during the last few minutes of cooking.
Drain and keep a little pasta water aside.
Sauté garlic in olive oil, add pasta and broccoli, then finish with lemon juice.

title: Creamy Avocado Basil Pasta
summary: A vegan pasta with a creamy avocado and basil sauce, balanced by lemon and garlic.
characteristicPhrase: Creamy Avocado Basil Pasta is a quick dairy-free pasta that feels rich while staying fully plant-based.
instructions: Cook the pasta in salted boiling water.
Blend avocado, basil, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Drain the pasta and mix it with the avocado sauce.
Serve immediately.

title: Tomato Spinach Chickpea Pasta
summary: A quick vegan pasta with tomato, spinach, and chickpeas for a more filling dinner.
characteristicPhrase: Tomato Spinach Chickpea Pasta is a simple high-fiber vegan dinner with tomato sauce, greens, and legumes.
instructions: Cook the pasta in boiling salted water.
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes and chickpeas, then simmer briefly.
Add spinach, mix with pasta, and serve.

title: Tofu-Free Lentil Bolognese
summary: A hearty vegan lentil sauce served over pasta, with no tofu and plenty of flavor.
characteristicPhrase: Tofu-Free Lentil Bolognese is a satisfying plant-based comfort dish using lentils as the protein base.
instructions: Cook lentils until tender if not already cooked.
Sauté onion, carrot, celery, and garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes and lentils, then simmer until thick.
Serve over cooked pasta.

title: Mild Broccoli Coconut Curry
summary: A mild vegan curry with broccoli and coconut milk, designed for people who do not want spicy food.
characteristicPhrase: Mild Broccoli Coconut Curry is a gentle and creamy vegan dinner with soft spice and a quick cooking time.
instructions: Cook the rice separately.
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add broccoli, curry powder, and coconut milk.
Simmer until the broccoli is tender and serve with rice.

title: Quick Vegan Rice Bowl with Chickpeas
summary: A fast rice bowl with chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, and lemon dressing.
characteristicPhrase: Quick Vegan Rice Bowl with Chickpeas is a fresh and balanced meal for a light but complete dinner.
instructions: Warm the rice and chickpeas if desired.
Chop cucumber and tomatoes.
Assemble everything in a bowl.
Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, and salt.

title: High-Protein Vegan Pasta with Beans
summary: A protein-focused vegan pasta using white beans, tomato, and greens.
characteristicPhrase: High-Protein Vegan Pasta with Beans is designed for a more filling dinner with legumes and simple pantry ingredients.
instructions: Cook the pasta in salted water.
Sauté garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes and beans, then simmer briefly.
Add spinach and combine with the pasta.

title: Roasted Vegetable Couscous
summary: A simple vegan couscous with roasted zucchini, peppers, and carrots.
characteristicPhrase: Roasted Vegetable Couscous is a colorful plant-based dinner with soft roasted vegetables and quick couscous.
instructions: Roast chopped vegetables with olive oil and salt.
Prepare couscous according to package instructions.
Mix couscous with roasted vegetables.
Finish with lemon juice and parsley.

title: Quick Vegan Mushroom Pasta
summary: A savory pasta with mushrooms, garlic, parsley, and olive oil.
characteristicPhrase: Quick Vegan Mushroom Pasta is a fast and earthy dinner with mushrooms and garlic, ideal for weeknights.
instructions: Cook the pasta in salted water.
Sauté mushrooms and garlic in olive oil.
Add pasta and a little pasta water.
Finish with parsley, salt, and pepper.

title: Lemon Pea Pasta
summary: A fresh vegan pasta with peas, lemon, and olive oil.
characteristicPhrase: Lemon Pea Pasta is a bright and simple plant-based dish for a quick dinner with very few ingredients.
instructions: Cook the pasta and add peas near the end.
Drain and reserve some pasta water.
Warm garlic in olive oil.
Mix everything with lemon zest and lemon juice.

title: Vegan Sweet Potato Bean Bowl
summary: A nourishing bowl with roasted sweet potato, black beans, and greens.
characteristicPhrase: Vegan Sweet Potato Bean Bowl is a balanced dinner with legumes, vegetables, and a naturally sweet roasted base.
instructions: Roast diced sweet potato with olive oil and paprika.
Warm the black beans.
Arrange everything over spinach.
Finish with lemon juice and salt.

title: Quick Zucchini Tomato Pasta
summary: A light vegan pasta with zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and garlic.
characteristicPhrase: Quick Zucchini Tomato Pasta is a fast weeknight recipe with fresh vegetables and simple Mediterranean flavors.
instructions: Cook the pasta in salted boiling water.
Sauté zucchini in olive oil.
Add tomatoes and garlic and cook briefly.
Toss with pasta and fresh basil.
